title: 5Pcs Candyland Party Banners Candy Themed Paper Decorations, Sweet Lollipop Candy Hanging Decors Candyland Themed Party Decorations Candy Decorations for Home Birthday Party Supplies
features: 【Sturdy Materials】Our candy themed party decorations include 50 pieces of various and cute candy style decors, made of card paper, which is sturdy, not easy to damage, and not easy to fade. Even if it gets wet, it can be wiped dry with a paper towel. The candy land themed party decorations hanging banners are printed on single side and the pattern on them are clear and shiny. The product is lightweight, which is convenient for you to hang or store.

【Eye-catching Design】The patterns of candy decorations are printed clearly. We use high-tech printing technology to make them shiny. Patterns with bright colors are colorful candy and lolipop, depply loved by children. Hanging them on the birthday party can bring vitality and sweety, making your childeren spend a jouyful and pleasant time together. Candyland party decorations can be used many times, creating a sweet and joy mood.

【Easy to Use】The candyland party decorations are very convenient to use. You only need to tie the string to the string threading needle, and then pass the string through the small holes on the top of five to six candy decorations, string them together, and you can get a candy theme banner decoration. You can string about five decorations according to the method. Hanging them on anywhere you want in order to decorate your house and prepare for the birthday party.

【Wide Applications】Candyland decorations are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. You can hang candy and lolipop themed banners decorations on the wall or window indoor when preparing birthday party to mobilize the party mood and add sweety and joy. In additions, it is surprise for your relatives and colleage who decide to organize a birthday party for their children to receive this decoration you give them as a gift.

【What You Will Get】You will receive 5pcs candy birthday party decorations, three ropes and a threading needle, and our timely and good after-sales service.If you find any problems with our products, please don’t be hesitate to contact us in time and we will provide you with a reasonable solution. If you have any questions about our product during using it, please tell us and we will solve the problem for you as soon as possible.
description: Product description Features: ----Our candy themed party decorations include 50 pieces of various and cute candy style decors, made of card paper, which is sturdy. ----We use high-tech printing technology to make pattern shiny. Patterns with bright colors are colorful candy and lolipop, depply loved by children. ----Candyland decorations are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.You can hang banners decorations on the wall or window. Specifications: Material: Paper Color: As pictures shown Size: As pictures shown Package Includes: 50 x candy decors 3 x ropes 1 x threading needle Safety Warning This product is made of paper and includes small parts. Keep away from open flames. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to choking hazard. Child supervision is required.
